chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Cr. Bail Application No.2216 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATUREs OF JUDGEs For hearing of bail application -------------------------------------------- 24.02.2025 Ms. Seema Zaidi, Additional Prosecutor General Sindh ------------------------------------------- None present for applicant/accused. Same was the position on last two dates of hearings viz. 24.10.2024 and 11.02.2025 whereas on 02.10.2024 and 25.11.2024 brief was hold on behalf of counsel for applicant/accused. Today, the position is same, counsel for applicant is called absent. Continuous absence of counsel for applicant shows that he has lost interest to pursue this case, therefore, instant criminal bail application is dismissed on account of non-prosecution. However, learned trial Court is directed to conclude the trial, preferably within a period of three months. J U D G E Gulsher/PS
